claim_boundary: Closure covers only the classified, generalized, currently evidenced failure class; a point fix, isolated test, or progress log cannot support broader confidence.

closure_rules.scope: current target revision and declared route only

forbidden_shortcuts.summary: Do not create a SkillGuard-owned alternate execution route.
Do not convert configured booleans, generated JSON, or progress into native pass evidence.
Do not skip required stages, checks, receipts, or blockers.

integration_claim_boundary: SkillGuard gates the target-native FlowGuard route; it does not execute a parallel controller or replace native model/test evidence.

native_check_bindings.evidence_source: current model runner receipt and final report

native_check_inventory.summary: Run model-miss review and broken closure variants.

native_route_bindings.source: FlowGuard canonical route registry and target contract source

not_parallel_route_proof.evidence_source: Canonical route registry, contract source, and may_define_* false gates
not_parallel_route_proof.summary: SkillGuard only validates the FlowGuard-owned route and cannot define an alternate successful execution path.

phases.summary: Preserve prior claim and observed failure, run preflight, and identify the existing commitment/owner.
Classify the miss and inventory root cause, fields, old paths, siblings, parent handoffs, and evidence targets.
Backpropagate the gap, generate canonical same-class cases, update model/field/owner-code boundaries, and add tests.
Run native miss review plus alignment, mesh, freshness, analogous scan, and risk gates for the changed class.
Close or explicitly scope the generalized class; never close from a point patch or later green command alone.

quality_floors.summary: Prompt prose, progress, or generated records cannot replace native evidence.
Missing, stale, skipped, scoped, progress-only, or pass-with-gaps evidence cannot support broad closure.

required_evidence.source: FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact

route_inventory.summary: Classify a concrete post-green failure and close its generalized behavior class across model, owner code, tests, fields, mesh, and risk evidence.

do_not_use_when: No concrete failure evidence exists, the request is a new feature, or a point patch is being treated as full bug-class closure.
routes.summary: Classify a concrete post-green failure and close its generalized behavior class across model, owner code, tests, fields, mesh, and risk evidence.

runtime_lock_policy.applies_when: The flowguard-model-miss-review skill is selected or delegated.
runtime_lock_policy.summary: The target-local contract, route, stage order, checks, evidence, and coverage matrix gate closure.

source_requirements.summary: Concrete failure evidence must map to an existing commitment/owner, miss type, and prior model/test gap.
Open fields, old paths, analogous siblings, parent reattachment, freshness, or risk evidence blocks broad class closure.
Observed and canonical same-class cases bind the repaired obligation, owner code contract, and current external tests.
Accept concrete failure evidence and prior claim state; classify and generalize the miss; block point-fix-only or stale closure; hand commitments, canonical cases, alignment, field, mesh, p.
description: Use when runtime, tests, replay, logs, manual validation, production evidence, or a user-visible UI failure exposes a missed behavior class after FlowGuard passed, or when a no.
Route id: model_miss_review; role: public_owner; native owner: model_miss_review. This standalone FlowGuard satellite skill owns miss classification and repair closure, not ungrounded featu.
Use after a FlowGuard-green runtime/test/replay/log/manual/UI failure or for a repair needing boundary_missing, root-cause backpropagation, and bug-class evidence.
The target section 'Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
A later green command or point regression alone cannot close the class; target-aware replay and owner code binding remain required when applicable.
Edit .skillguard/contract-source.json, then regenerate derived contracts; SkillGuard gates miss closure and cannot convert a patch or progress log into native evidence.
The target section 'Hard Gates' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Return evidence, failures, blockers, skipped_checks, residual_risk, claim_boundary, and typed_next_actions, plus a miss-repair diagram and generalized-case status.
Verify the real FlowGuard check engine and AGENTS.md managed record; never create a fake mini-framework.
The target skill description must be represented in the contract: Use when runtime, tests, replay, logs, manual validation, production evidence, or a user-visible UI failure exposes a misse.
The target skill entrypoint and hard gates must be represented by the runtime contract.
Declared hard gates and required workflow steps must be represented by checks and closure blockers.
Do not patch only the observed instance, invent a new feature commitment, or use without concrete failure evidence; return ordinary unclear modeling to model-first-function-flow.
The target section 'Do Not Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
The target section 'Output Requirements' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Add observed and same-class owner-code evidence, rerun alignment/mesh/freshness/risk gates, and close or scope the class.
Backpropagate a real post-green failure into the owning commitment, model boundary, owner code contract, canonical same-class cases, tests, and final claim.
Backpropagate root cause; add one family seed/finite boundary through ContractExhaustionMesh and bind fields/old paths where relevant.
The target section 'FlowGuard Model Miss Review' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Read references/model_miss_protocol.md for miss types, root-cause backpropagation, field/UI handling, same-class evidence, reattachment, and closure.
The target section 'Required Workflow' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Run existing-model preflight, identify the affected commitment/owner, and classify the miss.
Unknown old-path/field disposition, stale parent reattachment, open same-family scan, or missing template harvest closure blocks broad repair confidence.
